title: narcissus juncifolius subsp. minutiflorus
intro: Narcissus juncifolius subsp. minutiflorus, also known as dwarf rush-flower or small-flowered rush-flower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, headache, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Narcissus juncifolius subsp. minutiflorus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve circulation, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
